description:
Move all sensitive files from '/home/ga/SensitiveData/' into a new VeraCrypt encrypted container. 

1. Create a new volume at '/home/ga/Volumes/sensitive_encrypted.hc' (min 5MB, AES, SHA-512, FAT) with password 'SecureEncrypt2024!'.
2. Mount it to '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1'.
3. Copy all files from 'SensitiveData' into the volume.
4. Verify file integrity matches the provided 'data_manifest.sha256'.
5. Create a text file in the volume named 'transfer_report.txt' containing the text "FILES TRANSFERRED: 4" and "INTEGRITY: VERIFIED".
6. Dismount the volume.
7. Securely delete the original files from '/home/ga/SensitiveData/'.
